description_long: This is a large, multi-engine propeller airplane with a robust fuselage and a straight, mid-mounted wingspan. The aircraft features four engines mounted on the wings, each with visible propellers, and a conventional tail with a single vertical stabilizer and horizontal stabilizers. The landing gear appears to be retractable, with multiple wheels visible beneath the fuselage and wings. The cockpit is positioned at the forward end of the fuselage and is enclosed, with multiple windows for visibility. The exterior is primarily a muted greenish-gray color, with some panel lines and markings visible on the wings and fuselage. The overall design suggests a heavy-duty, possibly military or transport role, with ample space for crew and cargo inside.
description: A large, four-engine propeller airplane with a straight mid-mounted wing, conventional tail, and forward enclosed cockpit, finished in greenish-gray tones.
description_view_0: Front view showing the wide wingspan, four propeller engines, and the forward cockpit with the tail visible in the background.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the length of the fuselage, the mid-mounted wings, and the arrangement of the engines and landing gear.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the tail assembly, horizontal stabilizers, and the symmetrical placement of the engines along the wings.
description_view_3: Opposite side view similar to view 1, showing the other side of the fuselage, wing, and engine configuration.
attribute_wingspan_configuration: Mid-wing configuration with straight wings and no visible winglets; wings are mounted at the midpoint of the fuselage with a slight dihedral angle.
attribute_engine_type: Four piston engines mounted on the wings, each with a visible propeller.
attribute_tail_design: Conventional tail with a single vertical stabilizer and two horizontal stabilizers.
attribute_landing_gear_type: Retractable tricycle landing gear with two main gear units and a nose gear.
attribute_cockpit_placement: Forward-mounted, enclosed cockpit with multiple windows, likely multi-seat.
